payload.objective: Prove the shared restoring divider preserves every final value bit and ready/valid schedule under independent score-memory and result stalls.

decoder_contract.attention_two_pass_stream_equivalence_sc: Prove the exact single-unit restoring divider preserves the external score-SRAM/KV-replay stream arithmetic and schedule under independent memory/result backpressure.

evaluation_record.title: Scalable exact hierarchical softmax for Llama7B
evaluation_record.primary_question: Can one-pass online composition remain within a 0.01 output-value error bound across long-context score distributions, or should the scalable RTL use exact two-pass global-max score replay?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: The replacement must preserve every final value bit and ready/valid schedule before physical promotion.
